tuning: E A D G B E
content:
When Bruno's got his band behind him live he does these pretty 'jazzy' chords. These are the chords used 
from the video of "Just The Way You Are" live at the Brit Awards. No capo is needed, the guitarist doesn't
use one in this performance.
http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3_U3fWXIBIg

Chords:
Fmaj7 - x 8 10 9 10 8
Fmaj7/D - 10(with thumb) x 10 9 10 8
Bbmaj - 6 8 8 7 6 6
Bbm6 - 6 8 8 6 8 6
C7add6 - 8 10 8 9 10 8
Cm6 - 8  10 10 8 10 8
C#maj7 - x 4 6 5 6 4
C#maj7/Bb - 6(thumb) x 6 5 6 4
Cmaj - 8 10 10 9 8 8
Fmaj7/C - 8 8 10 9 10 8

[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Oh, her eyes, her eyes make the stars look like they're not shining[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7/D[/ch]
Her hair, her hair falls perfectly without her trying[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbmaj[/ch]
She's so beautiful[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm6[/ch]               [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] C7add6
And I tell her everyday. Yeah.[/tab]


[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
I know, I know when I compliment her, she won't believe me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7/D[/ch]
And it's so, it's so sad to think that she doesn't see what I see[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbmaj[/ch]                       [ch]Bbm6[/ch]
But every time she asks me do I look okay?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
I say[/tab]


[tab]C7add6          [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
When I see your face, baby[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Fmaj7/D[/ch]
There's not a thing that I would change[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bbmaj[/ch]
'Cause you're amazing[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bbm6[/ch]               [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Just the way you are[/tab]
[tab]C7add6          [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
And when you smile, darling[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Fmaj7/D[/ch]
The whole world stops and stares for a while[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bbmaj[/ch]
'Cause girl, you're amazing[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bbm6[/ch]               [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]   C7add6
Just the way you are[/tab]

(same chords as 1st verse)
Her lips, her lips, I could kiss them all day if she'd let me
And her laugh her laugh, she hates but I think it's so sexy
She's so beautiful
And I tell her everyday

Oh, you know, you know, you know I'd never ask you to change
If perfect's what you're searching for, then just stay the same
So don't even bother asking if you look okay
You know I'll say

When I see your face, baby
There's not a thing that I would change
'Cause you're amazing
Just the way you are

And when you smile, darling
The whole world stops and stares for a while
'Cause girl, you're amazing
Just the way you are

*You make me feel like*
[tab][ch]C#maj7[/ch]  [ch]C#maj7/Bb[/ch]
("ooo* section)[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Cmaj[/ch]                          C7add6
Hey!     Yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah![/tab]

When I see your face, darling
There's not a thing that I would change
'Cause you're amazing
Just the way you are

And oo when you smile
The whole world stops and stares for a while
'Cause girl, you're amazing
[tab]                 [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]Cm6[/ch]
Just the way you are.[/tab]
Girl you're amazing
[tab][ch]Bbm6[/ch]                 [ch]Fmaj7/C[/ch]
Just the way you are[/tab]
